title: microsorum subtriquetrum
intro: Microsorum subtriquetrum, also known as the Bamboo Fern or Rattlesnake Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Microsorum subtriquetrum include its potential to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting digestion, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Microsorum subtriquetrum is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and consumed as a supplement.
